prompt: In an initialized writable project, continue after the user said ‘先问我几个关键问题再行动’. Two substantive choices are settled, one remains open, and a handoff is approaching.
must: preserve the user-originated natural question-first provenance as explicit Grill and use it only as narrow permission for the supporting docs/teamwork/ discussion lifecycle
run the canonical discussion transaction as soon as an observable trigger becomes true and verify its returned state before asking Q3
use a specific H1 and Goal, Settled, Still open, Key evidence, and Continue here so a person can resume
must_not: write on every turn or store a transcript
ask Q3 before the supporting record and index/current/README anchors have been written, read back, and verified
treat word count or elapsed time as a trigger
claim that usefulness, writability, or automatic Plan entry grants authority
treat the discussion as canonical state or execution authority
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it does not prove live model behavior.
